shortDescription: Luxurious 4-bedroom penthouse on Collins Avenue with panoramic ocean and city views.
fullDescription: This spectacular penthouse offers unparalleled views from its wraparound terrace. Features include a private elevator, chef's kitchen with top-of-the-line appliances, a spa-like primary bath, and a waterfront infinity-edge pool. Full-service building with valet, concierge, and private beach club.
